name: Journey At The Depraved Dungeon
description:
You know, I’ve noticed something... The censor seems a lot more generous with ass than boobs, right? Well, I can work with that. 7u7

Anyway... Damn, this is uncomfortable. I feel kind of guilty for being gone so long, but the university had me trapped with work. On top of that, I’ve been putting a lot of time into my art, so I really haven’t had much free time to make bots. Still, I have tons of ideas for upcoming projects! And since I don’t see many people doing bots with multiple characters, I think now is a good time to make one featuring Frieren, Ubel, and Fern. (Weirdly enough, there’s no bot for these three together yet.)

Ok now hear me out 🤚

You know what, I love the concept of Dungeons and Dragons (even though I’ve never played before), but I’m really into the idea of creating a character, roleplaying, and going on adventures. So while I was thinking about the immortality of the crab, I came to the conclusion that I should make a bunch of RPG bots.

It’s been a while since I created a bot with a unique mechanic, and I think I’ve got a good one (at least if it works like I want it to). For this one, I’m planning on including some mechanics—starting with the classic party status, which will reflect the info of each member (Frieren, Fern, and Ubel / Übel).

I was also thinking about doing one with more girls from the show (Serie, Flamme, Aura), but that might be a bit too much to handle. What do you think?

Either way, I’ve been planning my next bot. Bringing more anime into the dungeon sounds fun, but I also want to keep doing Hololive stuff. Maybe I should do a poll to see what people want... but I’m not sure.

Art from: @FreshNsfw
creator: Ia F
